title: Pre Normalization Prep
author: Opentrons
description: The csv should include a header in row 1. Source/destination well should be in column 1. Qubit reading should be in column 3. The transfer volume is determined by the Qubit reading.
steps_raw: The csv should include a header in row 1. Source/destination well should be in column 1. Qubit reading should be in column 3. The transfer volume is determined by the Qubit reading.
Water added to final plate depending on csv
DNA added to final plate depending on csv
materials_raw: NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt #402501
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
